Market_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "4B5A0DF347E7156978C113934037A697", "You've unlocked the ability to access the ARC Market! You can do so through the Trade Node. The ARC Planetary Exchange Network - the Market - allows you to sell resources you've gathered for Credits , and use those Credits to purchase Construction Blueprints for your Outpost as well as new Crafting Plans. The Trade Node is the first of the Facilities that can access the Market. More advanced Facilities allow access to purchase more advanced Blueprints and Plans. Interact (LMB) with the Trade Node and select the 'Open Market' button to open the Market Panel.")

Market_2.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "19400F134F7BFD5EA81487ACE68B2DFC", "Items and resources that you are carrying are shown in the list on the right side of the Market Panel. You can use the + and - buttons to select how many of each type of item you'd like to Sell to ARC. Clicking (LMB) the item button itself will select all of that item for sale, and clicking it again will deselect all of that item. All selected items, and their total value, are shown in the central panel. Use the 'SELL' button to sell all selected items to ARC and gain the indicated amount of Credits .")

Market_3.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "6A566CBB46547934B2CC15ABCE22FD8C", "The left side of the Market Panel contains Crafting Plans and Construction Blueprints. Clicking (LMB) the relevant header button for each category will display those items that are available for sale in a list. Clicking (LMB) an item will select it for purchase, and display information about it as well as its cost in Credits in the central panel. You can filter for specific items using the search box above the category buttons. Use the 'PURCHASE' button to purchase the selected Plan or Blueprint, for the indicated amount of Credits .")
